scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/shared build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/api build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/web build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop build
scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/shared build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/api build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop dev
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/shared build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/api build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/web build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop build
scripts.make:desktop: pnpm build:desktop && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop exec electron-forge make
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/api test:smoke && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop typecheck && pnpm --filter @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop verify
